creator: shattered@users.sourceforge.net
text:
Apparently, SX6000 BIOS and boot2 are incompatible -- see http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-hackers/2003-April/000280.html and http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2003-July/006173.html.  There's no mention of this in man page, however.

How-To-Repeat: Try to boot 5.5 from RAID1 array on Promise SX6000.
